mapper.sql: id, policy_code, policy_name, daily_limit, monthly_limit, token_limit, alert_enabled, status, remark
mapper.insert: insert into quota_policies(policy_code, policy_name, daily_limit, monthly_limit, token_limit, alert_enabled, status, remark) values(#{policyCode}, #{policyName}, #{dailyLimit}, #{monthlyLimit}, #{tokenLimit}, #{alertEnabled}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.update: update quota_policies set policy_name = #{policyName}, daily_limit = #{dailyLimit}, monthly_limit = #{monthlyLimit}, token_limit = #{tokenLimit}, alert_enabled = #{alertEnabled}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
